THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCAFEE, THOMAS D. IF DEFTS FAIL TO VACATE, PLTF MAY GET AMENDED MONEY JDMT FOR FULL RELIEF IN COMPLAINT ON EX PARTE DECLARATION. PLTF TO KEEP ANY SECURITY DEPOSIT.
